action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble of 5 seeds got 0.7649 AUC, new best (+0.0065 over single 0.7584). Analysis: Ensembling works. Could train more seeds (e.g., 10 total) for further small gains, or vary architectures. Time: 0.42h left, 16 iters. Each seed train ~10s. Let me train 5 more seeds with different hyperparams (varied hidden dim, dropout) to add diversity, then ensemble all 10.
action.command: python train_div.py 5 checkpoints/seed5.pt 128 256 0.4 2e-3 && python train_div.py 6 checkpoints/seed6.pt 96 200 0.5 2e-3 && python train_div.py 7 checkpoints/seed7.pt 128 200 0.3 1e-3 && python train_div.py 8 checkpoints/seed8.pt 160 240 0.4 2e-3 && python train_div.py 9 checkpoints/seed9.pt 128 200 0.45 2.5e-3
